lessons.title: Freehold Covenants at Common Law
lessons.description: Common examples of freehold covenants include: "The purchaser covenants not to use the property for commercial purposes"; "The purchaser covenants to maintain the boundary fence"; "The purchaser covenants not to build above two st...

lessons.title: Equity and the LCLRA 2009
lessons.description: Equity's intervention on covenants is one of the most important doctrinal developments in English and Irish property law.
